## 🔒 Security Issue Report
**⚠️ IMPORTANT: For security issues, please email security@votechain.dev instead of using this template. This template is for reference only.**

## 📋 Vulnerability Description
A clear description of the security vulnerability.

## 🎯 Impact Assessment
What is the impact of this vulnerability?
- [ ] Critical - Can lead to loss of funds or complete system compromise
- [ ] High - Can lead to significant data loss or system disruption
- [ ] Medium - Can lead to limited data exposure or functionality issues
- [ ] Low - Minimal impact on security or functionality

## 🎯 Affected Components
Which parts of the system are affected?
- [ ] Smart Contracts
- [ ] Backend API
- [ ] Frontend Application
- [ ] Mobile Application
- [ ] Infrastructure
- [ ] Documentation

## 🔧 Technical Details
Technical information about the vulnerability:
- Vulnerability type (e.g., SQL injection, XSS, smart contract bug)
- Attack vector
- Potential exploitation methods
- Code snippets showing the issue

## 🛡️ Mitigation Suggestions
Any suggestions for mitigating this vulnerability.

## 📊 CVSS Score
If you know the CVSS score, please provide it:
- Base Score: 
- Impact Score:

## 🔗 Related Issues
Any related security issues or references.

## 📝 Additional Context
Any other context about the security issue.

## 🤝 Disclosure Timeline
- [ ] Discovery date
- [ ] Report date
- [ ] Response date
- [ ] Patch date
- [ ] Public disclosure date

## ⚠️ IMPORTANT REMINDER
**Do NOT report security vulnerabilities publicly. Email security@votechain.dev for responsible disclosure.**
